agent_runs_dedup_key_idx.name: agent_runs_dedup_key_idx
agent_runs_dedup_key_idx.where: "agent_runs"."dedup_key" IS NOT NULL AND "agent_runs"."status" NOT IN ('failed', 'cancelled')

projection_runs_completed_at_consistency.name: projection_runs_completed_at_consistency
projection_runs_completed_at_consistency.value: NOT ("projection_runs"."status" = 'running' AND "projection_runs"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL) AND NOT ("projection_runs"."status" = 'completed' AND "projection_runs"."completed_at" IS NULL)

projection_runs_completed_checksum_prese.name: projection_runs_completed_checksum_present
projection_runs_completed_checksum_prese.value: "projection_runs"."status" <> 'completed' OR ("projection_runs"."checksum" IS NOT NULL AND length("projection_runs"."checksum") > 0 AND octet_length("projection_runs"."checksum") <= 256 AND "projection_runs"."checksum" !~ '^[[:space:]]|[[:space:]]$')
